HoursAccount_Note: Note: sick and vacation count as worked hours.
User_ColorPaletteHint: Quick pick from the default palette:
User_AiStyleHintPlaceholder: e.g. 'Talk to me like a buddy, feel free to be witty' or 'Please address me formally.'
User_AiStyleHintHint: Sent to the AI planner as a tone hint. Empty = neutral default.
Hint_Main_Notifications: Your notifications — sick reports, shift swaps, vacation requests.
Hint_Main_Admin: Admin area: users, categories, recurring activities, settings, AI.
Hint_Main_MonthOverview: Monthly overview: actual / target / delta per person for the whole month.
Hint_Main_HoursAccount: Your hours account: current balance and weekly breakdown.
Hint_Main_Profile: Your profile: display name, language, color, theme, change password.
Hint_Main_Info: About: version, GitHub, buy me a coffee.
Hint_Cal_ViewToggle: Switch between your own view and the family view.
Hint_Cal_HoursBar: Shows a bar per person with actual/target weekly hours.
Hint_Cal_HolidaysToggle: Show/hide holidays in the weekday headers.
Hint_Cal_CopyWeek: Copies all entries of this week to the next (recurring activities are ignored).
Hint_Cal_Finalize: Mark the week as final. After that a sick report triggers an AI re-planning.
Hint_Cal_PDF: Export the week as PDF — from your view, with privacy masking.
Hint_Cal_Mail: Send the weekly PDF to selected recipients. Each gets their own masked view.
Hint_Cal_AiPlanner: AI assistant: ask about the plan or request re-planning suggestions.
Hint_Cal_EditNote: Edit day note (admin and parents only).
Hint_Login_RememberMe: Stay signed in on this device until you sign out.
Hint_Login_Connection: Switch between local storage (JSON) and server mode.
Hint_Entry_TypeWork: Work time — counts toward your hours account.
Hint_Entry_TypeActivity: Activity — school, day-care, sports, language class, leisure.
Hint_Entry_TypeAbsence: Sick/vacation/absent as a date range. Others only see "absent" without reason.
Hint_Entry_TypeOvernight: On-call overnight. Full time range shown, but a flat-rate hours credit.
Hint_Entry_SwapPropose: Propose a swap of this shift with another person.
Hint_Entry_EndDate: For absences: end date of the range.
Hint_Entry_ActivityCategory: Activity category (admin maintains the list per role).
Hint_Admin_Users: Create, edit, delete users. Roles, weekly-hours target, color also here.
Hint_Admin_Categories: Activity types with name, color and which roles can pick them.
Hint_Admin_Recurring: Weekly rules for recurring activities (sports Tuesdays, day-care weekdays, …).
Hint_Admin_Settings: State (holidays), overnight flat rate, SMTP, update check interval.
Hint_Admin_Ai: Choose the AI provider and configure the model.
Hint_Swap_Accept: Confirm the swap — the shift changes automatically.
Hint_Swap_Reject: Reject the swap. The other person will be notified.
Hint_Profile_Color: Your calendar color. Chips, bars and cells use this color.
Hint_Profile_AiStyleHint: Free-form hint to the AI on tone (e.g. 'formal', 'casual').
Onboarding_Slide1_Body: FlexFamily Calendar helps your family plan work hours, activities, sick reports and shift swaps together — with privacy for each person. This short tour shows you the main elements in four steps.
Onboarding_Slide2_Body: After signing in you see a table: people as rows, weekdays as columns. Click an empty cell to open the entry editor — you can log work, activity, absence or overnight there. Use the arrows or "Today" to move between weeks.
Onboarding_Slide3_Body: The header buttons take you to your hours account, the monthly overview (actual/target/delta), your profile and — as admin — the admin area with users and settings. "PDF" exports the current week, "Mail" sends it to everyone with an email address.
Onboarding_Slide4_Body: Hover the buttons — the little hover hints explain each element. If you no longer want to see them, you can turn them off in your profile under "Show hover hints". Click "Got it" to start.
Mobile_Absence_Reason: Reason (only you and admins see it)
Mobile_Absence_Missing: Please pick type, from and to.
Mobile_Swap_Note: Until then you can request a swap on the web view at flexfamily.cloud.
Mobile_Swap_ShiftPlaceholder: Pick a shift in the next 3 weeks
Mobile_Swap_Missing: Please pick a shift and a coworker.
Connection_Subtitle: Choose whether the app runs purely locally with JSON files or connects to a server.
Connection_RestartHint: Please restart the app after saving for the connection change to take effect.
Connection_ErrorUrlInvalid: Please provide a valid http(s) address.
Connection_Tooltip: Change server URL or work locally
Cal_ReorderPersonHint: Drag to change the person order
AiPlanner_Subtitle: Persist hints or ask questions about the schedule.
AiPlanner_NotesHeader: Hints for the AI (sent on every request)
AiPlanner_NotePlaceholder: e.g. 'Pausch works from home on Mondays'
AiPlanner_NoProvider: No AI provider is configured. Set one up under Admin → AI.
AiPlanner_NoAnswer: No answer received. Check provider/key in settings.
AiPlanner_ClearHistoryTooltip: Remove all prior messages — the AI will start with no memory of past chats.
AiPlanner_JumpToDate: Jump to this day in the calendar
Swap_NoCounterShifts: This colleague has no swappable shift this week.
Swap_NoColleagues: No colleagues available to swap with.
Swap_ErrorNoCounterShift: Please select a shift from the colleague.
Swap_SummaryExchange: {0} wants to swap the shift {1} for {3} from {2}.
Swap_ErrorFinalized: The week is finalized – swap not possible.
Swap_ErrorOverlap: Time overlap at the colleague – swap not possible.
Notif_ShiftAssigned: A shift on {0} was assigned to you (sick cover).
Replan_NoSick: No sick leave on this day.
Replan_AiUnavailable: No AI configured – candidates sorted by workload.
Replan_NoCandidates: No available colleague found for this shift.
Replan_NoShift: No work shift to reassign on this day.
Mail_Body:
Hello,

please find the weekly plan for {0} attached.

Best regards
Mail_NotConfigured: Please configure SMTP under Admin → Settings first.
Mail_NoRecipients: No person has an email address on file.
DayNote_AudienceHint: If a person is selected, only the admin and that person see this note.
RecurrencePause_NewHeader: New pause — choose dates, then click 'Add pause'
RecurrencePause_ErrorNoDate: Please choose a start and an end date.
Recur_ErrorNoTime: Please enter a start and end time.
Recur_ErrorEndBeforeStart: The end time must be after the start time.
Recur_ErrorNoWeekday: Please select at least one weekday.
Entry_ErrorSameTime: Start and end time must not be identical.
Entry_OvernightNote: Overnight (on call): shown across the whole span, but only credited as a flat rate to the hours account (set in Admin → Settings).
Ai_ServerConfigured: The API key is configured on the server (Ai__<Provider>__Key). Only pick the provider and an optional model here.
Update_NoAsset: No direct update package for your platform — open the release page to download manually.
